synopsis: THE COUNTDOWN TO INSIDER #200 BEGINS! GREG GRUNBERG - ace Resistance pilot Snap Wexley - opens up about his love for the saga. ELIZABETH GRULLON discusses her experience playing JEDI: FALLEN ORDER's villainous Second Sister. We count down EMPEROR PALPATINE'S top 5 apprentices - Plus, all the latest news from every sector of the Star Wars galaxy!
title: Insider #198
